## Agent Guide — Comparison

### Scope
- This folder contains examples for **Comparison**.
- Files are standalone `.cs` examples stored directly in this folder.

### Category-specific expectations
- Keep example focused on the category topic; avoid unrelated features.
- Prefer public Aspose.Words APIs; avoid internal namespaces unless rules explicitly require otherwise.
